description:
A locally hosted one-stop shop for all your PDF needs

Stirling-PDF is a robust, locally hosted web-based PDF manipulation tool using Docker. It enables you to carry out various operations on PDF files, including splitting, merging, converting, reorganizing, adding images, rotating, compressing, and more. This locally hosted web application has evolved to encompass a comprehensive set of features, addressing all your PDF requirements.
This release adds several changes including desktop hardware token signing and changes to various UI elements
Features include:
- Desktop token signing! Such as USB/smart-card PKCS#11 and OS certificate stores etc (Currently desktop only)
- Fixes for shared signing and file sharing UIs to be reintroduced in top bar
- Improved Side menu for comments/annotations and attachments with easier adding and new clear all buttons
- Login disclaimer feature for businesses that want it
- Fix desktop login issues
- Adds logo to installer and renames installer internal name from Stirling-PDF to Stirling PDF (without the -)
What's Changed
Enhancements
- Add login agreement disclaimer feature by @Frooodle in #6766
- Add bulk comment and annotation clearing to editor by @MattSaito in #6792
- More desktop CI optimisations by @jbrunton96 in #6786
- Upgrade to TS7 for local type-checking by @jbrunton96 in #6815
- Expand any type linting in frontend by @jbrunton96 in #6808
- Brand MSI installer and rename display name to Stirling PDF by @Frooodle in #6764
- Align settings.yml defaults and fix dead/mismapped settings by @Frooodle in #6816
- UX improvement for side menu bookmark, comments and attachments by @Frooodle in #6552
- feat(policies): enforce run-on-export policies on all PDF exit paths by @reecebrowne in #6788
- feat(shared): make @shared the single home for brand logo assets by @reecebrowne in #6714
- Fix missing refresh token on desktop by @jbrunton96 in #6838
- add file share to the top workbench bar and add shared signing by @EthanHealy01 in #6715
- Update Backend 3rd Party Licenses + Translations and bump versio by @StirlingBot[bot] in #6794
- Signing UI edge-case cleanup by @EthanHealy01 in #6849
- build(deps): bump test pypdf + add translations by @dependabot[bot] in #6831
Other Changes
- Fix PR docker CI when the base image changes by @Frooodle in #6809
- Make explicit signed and unsigned desktop CI jobs by @jbrunton96 in #6840
Full Changelog: v2.13.2...v2.14.0
